hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: logger
options.description: Enable logging using the provided logger name. [default: default]

options.name: log-level
options.description: The minimum log level. The default is 'Information'. [default: Information]

options.name: log-template
options.description: The serilog log template. The default is {Timestamp:yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss} [{Level:u3}] ({SourceContext}) {Message}{NewLine}. [default: {Timestamp:yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss} [{Level:u3}] ({SourceContext}) {Message}{NewLine}]

options.name: arg
options.description: An argument for the script to be called. Use --arg argname=argvalue or --arg "argname=argvalue with space". Repeat this for each argument.
